creator: nakai@TokyoNet.AD.JP
text:
Sorry, I've forgotten to append patch. :)

Yukihiro Nakai
--------------
diff -ruN gtkdps.orig/Makefile gtkdps/Makefile
--- gtkdps.orig/Makefile	Fri Dec 25 13:11:03 1998
+++ gtkdps/Makefile	Fri Dec 25 13:10:50 1998
@@ -1,15 +1,15 @@
 # New ports collection makefile for:   gtkdps
-# Version required:    0.2.11
+# Version required:    0.2.16
 # Date created:        21 April 1998
 # Whom:                Yukihiro Nakai <Nakai@technologist.com>
 #
 # $Id: Makefile,v 1.6 1998/10/05 02:59:02 steve Exp $
 #
 
-DISTNAME=	gtkDPS-0.2.11
-PKGNAME=	gtkdps-0.2.11
+DISTNAME=	gtkDPS-0.2.16
+PKGNAME=	gtkdps-0.2.16
 CATEGORIES=	graphics
-MASTER_SITES= 	ftp://ftp.aist-nara.ac.jp/pub/personal/masata-y/gyve/fullkit/gyve-0.1.2.4/
+MASTER_SITES= 	ftp://ftp.aist-nara.ac.jp/pub/personal/masata-y/gyve/fullkit/gyve-0.2.1/
 
 MAINTAINER=	Nakai@technologist.com
 
diff -ruN gtkdps.orig/files/md5 gtkdps/files/md5
--- gtkdps.orig/files/md5	Fri Dec 25 13:11:03 1998
+++ gtkdps/files/md5	Fri Dec 25 12:57:10 1998
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (gtkDPS-0.2.11.tar.gz) = a1552e3889719dc41cd30b2f050abdc4
+MD5 (gtkDPS-0.2.16.tar.gz) = b056af782a1bb80539fc82d41d1f0721
